title: CatalogedApiVersion - Metadata API
description: Represents a version of an API that is consumable in Salesforce using API Catalog.

catalogedApi.description: An API managed for consumption in Salesforce using API Catalog.

description.description: The description defined when the API is cataloged.

externalSourceIdentifier.description: The ID of the API in the external source that it's imported from.

label.description: The API name as it appears in API Catalog.

version.description: The ID of the API version information.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="CatalogedApiVersion">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="catalogedApi" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="externalSourceIdentifier" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="label" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="version" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: This XML is an example of a CatalogedApiVersion component.
